statusLine.command: input=$(cat); model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name // "Unknown"'); cwd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir // "~"'); used_pct=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.used_percentage // empty'); cd "$cwd" 2>/dev/null; branch=$(git -c core.fileMode=false symbolic-ref --short HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo ""); parts=("$model"); [ -n "$branch" ] && parts+=("[$branch]"); if [ -n "$used_pct" ]; then bar_width=10; used_int=${used_pct%.*}; filled=$((used_int * bar_width / 100)); empty=$((bar_width - filled)); bar=""; for ((i=0; i<filled; i++)); do bar+="█"; done; for ((i=0; i<empty; i++)); do bar+="░"; done; parts+=("$bar ${used_pct}%"); fi; printf "%s" "${parts[0]}"; for ((i=1; i<${#parts[@]}; i++)); do printf " | %s" "${parts[i]}"; done; printf "\n"
